## Meeting Purpose

[Company all-hands meeting to provide updates, introduce new hires, and discuss product developments.](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several new team members introduced, expanding company's global presence](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Strong sales performance with multiple new high-profile clients signed (e.g. Lovable, CodeRabbit)](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Significant progress on agentic workflows for content refreshing, showing promising results](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Plans to open up Atlas platform to customers, enhancing value proposition and stickiness](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

## Topics

### New Hire Introductions

  - [Eight new team members introduced from diverse global locations (US, Serbia, Mexico, Brazil, Colombia, Vermont)](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [New hires bring various skills and interests, from software engineering to algorithmic trading](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Sales and Customer Updates

  - [Multiple new high-profile clients signed, including Lovable (fastest to $100M in history)](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Strong pipeline with referrals from advisors and positive word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Renewed contracts driven by high-volume, high-quality content delivery (e.g. Ramp: 700+ pieces)](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)

### Agentic Workflow Development

  - [New refresher pipeline using agentic workflows shows significant improvements](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Research agent iterates up to 3 times to meet quality threshold](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Drafting agent considers writing guidelines with weighted scoring](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Post-processing agent planned for additional refinement](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Testing shows 25-30 minute completion times, down from hours previously](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Atlas Platform Development

  - [Plans to open Atlas to customers, starting with dashboard and analytics visibility](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Future features to include feedback integration, knowledge base access, and self-serve options](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Pricing initially included in current customer fees](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Aim to make service engagements more sticky and scalable](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)

### Investor Relations

  - [Series B pitches ongoing with positive feedback on customer satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [Company financials and pitch deck continuously improving](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [Unique business model challenging for some investors to categorize, but deep-dive meetings yielding positive results](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=3236.0)

### Community Growth

  - [41 paying members in the company's AI community](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=2936.0)
  - [Workshops and content being gated to drive engagement and value](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=2987.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue testing and gathering feedback on agentic workflows from content team](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Develop best practices and templates for prompting in refresher instructions](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Progress Atlas development for customer access, focusing on efficiency gains](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=1678.0)
  - [Maintain transparency with team about Series B funding process](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=3060.0)
  - [Further develop and promote AI community for continued growth](https://fathom.video/share/SHfZBD7dqxa_pN7SBC8VchXSHg-xDE4z?tab=summary&timestamp=2963.0)
